title: March 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 1''' is the 60th day of the year (61st in leap years). There are 305 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1952|1952]] – [[Steven Barnes]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Ron Howard]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Leland Chee]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Ed McGuinness]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Lupita Nyong'o]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 141|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 141]] published.
*[[1993]] – ''[[Queen of the Empire]]'' published.
*[[1994]] – ''[[Jedi Search]]'' published.
*1994 – ''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]'' published.
*1994 – [[Classic Star Wars 17|''Classic Star Wars'' 17]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 98|''Classic Star Wars: The Vandelhelm Mission'']] published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Before the Storm]]'' published.
*1996 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Lightsabers]]'' published.
*[[1997]] – [[Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End 1|''Classic Star Wars: Han Solo at Stars' End'' 1]] published.
*1997 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 17|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 17]] published.
*1997 – ''[[Music from the Star Wars Trilogy: Special Edition]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – [[Archie Goodwin]] dies.
*1998 – ''[[Han Solo's Rescue Mission]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Luke Skywalker's Race Against Time]]'' published.
*1998 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 7: Ithorian Invasion]]''published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 19: Bounty on Bonadan]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I Adventures (TPB)|''Star Wars: Episode I Adventures'' trade paperback]] published.
*2000 – ''[[Episode I Adventures 7: Capture Arawynne]]'' and [[Episode I Adventures Game Book 7: Capture Arawynne|''Episode I Adventures Game Book 7'']] published.
*2000 – ''[[Star Wars: The Power of Myth]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Living Force Campaign Guide]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Threat Within]]'' published.
*2002 – [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]] published at newsstands.
*2002 – ''[[Tempest Feud]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Changing of the Guard]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – ''[[The Cinema of George Lucas]]'' published.
*[[2006]] – [[Empire 40|''Empire'' 40]] published
*2006 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic/Rebellion flip-book]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – "[[The Wrong Jedi]]" airs in Canada.
*[[2016]] – ''[[Dark Disciple]]'' paperback published.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 29|''Star Wars'' (2015) 29]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Han Solo – Taking Flight for his Friends]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[The High Republic: Mission to Disaster]]'' published in hardcover.
*2022 – [[Star Wars: Galactic Starcruiser|''Star Wars'': Galactic Starcruiser]] opens.
*[[2023]] – "[[Metamorphosis (episode)|Metamorphosis]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*2023 – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 10|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 10]] published.
*2023 – [[Hidden Empire 4|''Hidden Empire'' 4]] published.
*2023 – [[Hyperspace Stories 4|''Hyperspace Stories'' 4]] published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars (2020) 32|''Star Wars'' (2020) 32]] published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic — The Blade 3|''The High Republic — The Blade'' 3]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian (2022) 8|''The Mandalorian'' (2022) 8]] published.
*2023 – [[The Mandalorian Season Three|''The Mandalorian'' Season Three]] premiered on [[Disney+]] with "[[Chapter 17: The Apostate]]".
*[[2024]] – "[[The Caves of Batuu / Finders Keepers]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
*[[2025]] – "[[Nubs Tries To Sleep]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
<noinclude>
